chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-145 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For Hearing of CMA 640/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 17-03-2025 Mr. Z.A. Naich, Advocate along with both petitioners. Mr. Vinod Kumar, Advocate along with respondent No.5. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w SIP/I.O Gul Hassan of P.S, Balo-Ja-Quba district Shaheed Benazirabad. ***** Learned AAG files statement on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioners. SIP/I.O, Balo-Ja-Quba is present and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 who has reiterated her marriage with petitioner No.2 and therefore he will file a report before concerned Magistrate disposing of the case under C-class. After such statement, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of this petition with further prayer that directions may be issued for protection. Under the above circumstances, the I.O is directed to submit report, as suggested by him within 15 days before the Court having jurisdiction. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
